title: GUI Implementation (Phase 8):
job:
GUI Implementation (Phase 8):

1. Develop Multi-Scene Editor:
   - Create `literary_ai/gui/main.py` for core GUI logic
   - Implement drag-and-drop scene reordering
   - Add beat adjustment sliders for pacing control

2. Revision History System:
   - Build `ui/revisions.py` for version history tracking
   - Implement "Compare Revisions" feature
   - Add undo/redo functionality for scene edits

3. Export Integration:
   - Create `ui/export_options.py` for format selection
   - Add Markdown/DOCX export buttons
   - Implement export progress indicators

4. CLI Command Enhancement:
   - Update `literary-ai gui` to launch the interface
   - Add `--mode` flag for editing/viewing

5. Artifacts:
   - GUI file structure
   - Core UI components
   - Export integration
   - Phase 9 roadmap
